meta.title: Is the US staging stealth bombers in Diego Garcia to strike Iran?
meta.description:
The United States appears to be massing power, including B-2 Spirit stealth bombers, in Diego Garcia in the Indian Ocean — leading many to speculate that the U.S. is preparing to strike Iran.. let’s talk about what’s going on, and why people are, maybe reasonably, jumping to this conclusion.
